## Checklist

- [ ] If releasable packages changed, I added or updated the required Changeset.
- [ ] I treated `package.json` as the only version source of truth for releasable packages.
- [ ] I did not manually bump releasable package versions in `deno.json` or `jsr.json`.
- [ ] For release-affecting changes, I ran `npm run release:prepare` locally or relied on the `Release Readiness` workflow.
